name: Optimumbank
description_short: Community bank serving South Florida with traditional in-person banking, business lending, and consumer accounts since 2000. No-fee checking and SBA loans available.
description_long:
OptimumBank was founded in November 2000 by a group of local Broward County businessmen to reverse the trend of out-of-state mega-banks dominating South Florida. The bank was structured to allow local investors of all sizes to own a stake in the institution, emphasizing community ownership and control. With over 25 years of community banking experience, OptimumBank operates physical branch locations in Fort Lauderdale, North Miami Beach, and Deerfield Beach, focusing on relationship-driven banking in the region.

OptimumBank offers comprehensive banking services for both personal and business customers. Personal banking includes Simply Free Checking (no monthly fees, no minimum balance, free debit card reimbursement), personal savings, and online banking. Business banking services encompass business checking and savings, commercial lending, SBA loans up to $5 million, HOA specialty banking, and cash management services including Remote Deposit Capture, ACH Origination, and online domestic wire transfers. They also provide access to Zelle through their Bill Pay platform.

What distinguishes OptimumBank from larger financial institutions is their explicit positioning as a community bank where "customers are a name, not a number." Their fee structure directly addresses complaints about mega-bank fees—Simply Free Checking eliminates monthly fees and minimum balance requirements while reimbursing debit card fees. The bank emphasizes experienced commercial lenders with deep expertise in real estate and business lending, catering to sophisticated business needs. Their hybrid model combines internet banking convenience with traditional in-person service, which they position as the "optimum" way to bank.

OptimumBank is a regional community bank best suited for South Florida residents and businesses seeking personalized service and lower fees than national institutions. The main limitation is geographic—they operate only three physical branches in a specific South Florida region, making them inaccessible for customers outside this area. While customer testimonials are positive, the company's size and scope are significantly smaller than national or regional banks, which may limit product depth or digital innovation compared to larger competitors. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Simply Free Checking (no fees, no minimum balance)

No indication of mobile app or digital banking capabilities comparable to modern neobanks
As a regional bank, likely limited product variety and innovation compared to national institutions

typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
